It features a monogrammed zipper for security and a wide opening for easy access to coins, cards, and folded bills. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: 🆕 【 M80334 Hardware Green】This horizontal Zippy Wallet is made from Monogram Eclipse canvas with bronze-toned hardware. Inspired by the traditional vertical Zippy wallet, it features a horizontal orientation for enhanced practicality. This all-zippered wallet design includes a main compartment with a zippered central wallet, six card slots on each side, and two flat pockets for bills. Dimensions: 21 x 2.5 x 10 cm C

items.name_en: 🆕 【Portfoille Locky Wallet】M12148 Brown M12408 Black White Yellowish Green
items.name_cn:
🆕 【Portfoille Locky Wallet】M12148 Brown M12408 Black White Yellowish Green
Celebrating Maison craftsmanship with this new take on minimalism, the "Portfoille・Lowy・Compact". Finished with a smooth calfskin exterior and a luxurious calfskin lining, adorned with an antique-style exquisite gold lock. The interior features multiple pockets for coins and bills, along with 3 card slots that are also very attractive.
Size: 11 x 8.5 x 2cm

items.name_en: 🆕 【Top Grade Original】M12598 Black Monogram 👏👏 The 'Victoire Wallet' elegantly carries coins, cards, bills, and receipts in a single-piece Monogram canvas.
